raw_output: Imagine you have a magic toy box that can be **both** red **and** blue at the same time (like how your favorite toy can do two things together!). Regular computers are like simple light switches (just on or off), but quantum computers are like this magic box. They help solve super-big **puzzle**s—like finding the *exact* way to build a giant LEGO castle—way faster than any toy you’ve ever had! Whoosh! ✨
